history.text: Sanjak of Prizren appears in Kosovo's historical record.
Kosovo Vilayet ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Treaty of London set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
Autonomous Province within Yugoslavia appears in Kosovo's historical record.
Republic of Kosova introduced a new form of state rule.
Kumanovo Agreement set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
UN Administration placed the territory under outside administration.
A declaration of independence was issued, making sovereignty the central political claim.

worthSeeing.title: Visoki Decani:
worthSeeing.text: A 14th-century Serbian Orthodox monastery in a mountain valley, UNESCO listed.

worthSeeing.title: Rugova Canyon:
worthSeeing.text: A dramatic gorge near Peja ideal for rafting, climbing and mountain walks.

worthSeeing.title: Pristina Cafe Scene:
worthSeeing.text: The young, vibrant capital has a growing arts, cafe and nightlife culture.
